Headline: #29 State Temporary Southbound Reroute near 83rd/Lafayette
ShortDescription: Southbound 29 State buses are temporarily rerouted via Lafayette, 83rd, Holland, 87th and Lafayette due to, street blockage near 83rd/Lafayette.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #29 State buses are temporarily rerouted via Lafayette, 83rd, Holland, 87th and Lafayette due to, street blockage near 83rd/Lafayette.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
